intro: This archive covers nine reports from April 12–20, 2026, detailing Android-related threats. The activity includes Mirax and exploits leveraging CVE-2023-4863. The reporting highlights a severity mix of four high, three informational, and two critical incidents. The primary affected sectors were cryptocurrency, individuals, technology, and telecommunications. Geographically, the impacts were noted in Europe, Latin America, Spain, and on a Global scale.
